arts.ttl: SPFL confirm key dates for 25/26 season as Brendan Rodgers and Celtic learn winter break fate
arts.sum: From dates relating to the Scottish Premiership and the Scottish League Cup to whether or not the winter break will return. Celtic can start to plan for next season as the SPFL have confirmed key dates relating to the 2025/26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer off due to ‘FIFA earthquake’ – Outgoing move takes ‘unexpected turn’
arts.sum: Over the past week there’s been multiple claims from the Spanish media regarding Luis Palma and a move from Celtic to Rayo Vallecano. The Honduras international is thought to be surplus to requirement under Brendan Rodgers at Celtic and has therefore been made available on the market. arts.ttl: How Rangers have helped Celtic this season as Callum McGregor addresses 'one eye on Champions League'
arts.sum: “But probably the Rangers one was a good one, just to refocus the group and realise that when you lose a game it hurts you and it doesn’t matter how far ahead you are or how well you’ve done previously when you lose a game of football, it hurts. A win in one of those games will be enough to secure Celtic a knockout playoff spot but McGregor has vowed to ensure his side won’t only focus on that.
